chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 224 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.03.2025 For orders on MA 1713/25 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 1714/25 For hearing of main case Mr. Sher Dil Ansari, Advocate along with Applicant Applicant Mazhar Ali Sehto seeks protective bail in FIR No. 24 of 2024 registered by FIA, AML Circle Sukkur for offences punishable under Sections 3, 4 AML Act 2010 Amended r/w Section 109 PPC. Learned Counsel submits that the Applicant is innocent and has falsely been implicated in this case due to mala fide intention and ulterior motives; that the Applicant is law abiding citizen and intends to appear before the Trial Court but he feels apprehension of his arrest at the hands of FIA officials in order to humiliate and disgrace him; therefore, he needs protection in order to enable him to appear before the Trial Court. Without touching merits of the case, the Applicant is granted protective bail for five days subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Thirty Thousand only) and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. The N.B.Ws issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of seven days or whenever he surrenders himself before the Trial Court whichever is earlier. This Cr. Bail Application along with pending applications stands disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
